Class LegoSet

java.lang.Object
LegoSet
public class LegoSet extends Object
LegoSet Class This class represents a single Lego set and stores its details. Each Lego set contains information such as ID, name, number of pieces, price, release year, and recommended age.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LegoSet()
    Default constructor Allows creation of a LegoSet object without initial values.
    LegoSet(String legoSetID, String setName, int pieceCount, double price, int releaseYear, int recommendedAge)
    Parameterized constructor Creates a LegoSet object with all attributes provided.

  • Constructor Details

    • LegoSet

      public LegoSet(String legoSetID, String setName, int pieceCount, double price, int releaseYear, int recommendedAge)
      Parameterized constructor Creates a LegoSet object with all attributes provided.
      Parameters:
      legoSetID - Unique ID of the Lego set
      setName - Name of the Lego set
      pieceCount - Number of pieces in the set
      price - Price of the set
      releaseYear - Year the set was released
      recommendedAge - Recommended age for the set

    • LegoSet

      public LegoSet()
      Default constructor Allows creation of a LegoSet object without initial values.
